description: M1 Warehouse — PDF guideline library (4 tiers, 404 PDFs) and warehouse maintenance scripts. Stores source PDFs and runs operational scripts that keep the library current.

00_non-codon.description: Codon-named PDFs that have NOT yet been through the extraction/enrichment/synthesis pipeline. Backlog.

01_local_lite.description: ITE-linked articles with lightweight processing. Not VC-cited (not in session_hy_inserts_v7.json).

02_codon.description: Codon-named, ITE-linked, VC-cited PDFs. Verified correct content.

03_right_click.description: Fully processed PDFs — ran through the complete right-click pipeline (extract → synthesize → enrich → DOCX). VC-cited tier.

naming_convention: Author_Year#@#ART-XXXX@#@.pdf — ART-ID embedded between #@# start codon and @#@ stop codon
vc_gate: key_data_files/session_hy_inserts_v7.json (352 citations) — sole criterion for right_click vs local_lite tier assignment

build.description: Structural / one-time scripts. Assume DB does NOT exist yet. Run once during initial setup.

maintain.description: Operational / recurring scripts. Assume DB exists and has data.
scripts: build_match_staging.py — proposes ART-ID matches for unmatched PDFs
match_tiers_to_library.py — scans warehouse PDFs vs ReferenceTiers CSV → match_summary.csv (migrated BATON 006)
rebuild_acquisition_list.py — match_summary → confirmed_present.csv + ranked acquisition XLSX (migrated BATON 006)
maintain.path_pattern: SCRIPT_DIR.parent.parent.parent = PROJECT_ROOT (3 levels: maintain → scripts → 01_module → PROJECT_ROOT)

database.note: DB lives in 00_database/, not in M1. M1 scripts reach it via PROJECT_ROOT / '00_database' / 'db' / 'ite_intelligence.db'

companion_libraries_absorbed.note: Old companion libraries (02_docx_guideline_library, 03_enriched_JSON) are being absorbed into the new structure. Enriched JSONs now live in extracted_json/ at PROJECT_ROOT.

baton_006_20260324: Added match_tiers_to_library.py to maintain/ (migrated from TEMP_05, de-hardcoded)
Added rebuild_acquisition_list.py to maintain/ (migrated from TEMP_05, removed stale 00_canonical/ copy step)
baton_004_20260324: Created scripts/build/ and scripts/maintain/ subdirectory structure
Populated maintain/ with 11 scripts (7 from M2 + 1 from agents + 3 existing)
pre_overhaul_20260320: PDF library migrated from old structure into 4-tier folder system
04 tier audit complete: 3 wrong-content files deleted, 6 re-IDed, permissions unlocked
